mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalEvents, COUNT(DISTINCT e.stock_code) AS totalStocks, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(e.signal_score), 2), 0) AS avgSignalScore, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(s.backtest_score, 0)), 2), 0) AS avgBacktestScore, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(m20.is_positive_flag, 0)), 6), 0) AS winRate20d, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(m20.return_pct), 6), 0) AS avgReturn20d, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(m60.hit_10pct_flag, 0)), 6), 0) AS hit10PctRate60d, MAX(e.signal_date) AS latestSignalDate FROM stock_signal_event e LEFT JOIN stock_backtest_summary s ON s.stock_code = e.stock_code LEFT JOIN stock_backtest_metric m20 ON m20.event_id = e.event_id AND m20.horizon_days = 20 LEFT JOIN stock_backtest_metric m60 ON m60.event_id = e.event_id AND m60.horizon_days = 60
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_signal_event e LEFT JOIN stock_backtest_summary s ON s.stock_code = e.stock_code

SELECT e.event_id AS eventId, e.stock_code AS stockCode, e.stock_name AS stockName, e.signal_date AS signalDate, e.event_scope AS eventScope, e.increase_count AS increaseCount, e.increase_amount AS increaseAmount, e.increase_ratio_sum AS increaseRatioSum, e.increase_ratio_max AS increaseRatioMax, e.changer_count AS changerCount, e.changer_names AS changerNames, e.position_tags AS positionTags, e.has_same_day_decrease AS hasSameDayDecrease, e.same_day_decrease_amount AS sameDayDecreaseAmount, e.consecutive_increase_days AS consecutiveIncreaseDays, e.signal_score AS signalScore, COALESCE(s.backtest_score, 0) AS backtestScore, m5.return_pct AS return5d, m10.return_pct AS return10d, m20.return_pct AS return20d, m60.return_pct AS return60d FROM stock_signal_event e LEFT JOIN stock_backtest_summary s ON s.stock_code = e.stock_code LEFT JOIN stock_backtest_metric m5 ON m5.event_id = e.event_id AND m5.horizon_days = 5 LEFT JOIN stock_backtest_metric m10 ON m10.event_id = e.event_id AND m10.horizon_days = 10 LEFT JOIN stock_backtest_metric m20 ON m20.event_id = e.event_id AND m20.horizon_days = 20 LEFT JOIN stock_backtest_metric m60 ON m60.event_id = e.event_id AND m60.horizon_days = 60
ORDER BY e.increase_amount ASC, e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY e.increase_amount DESC, e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY e.signal_score ASC, e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY e.signal_score DESC, e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY COALESCE(s.backtest_score, 0) ASC, e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY COALESCE(s.backtest_score, 0) DESC, e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY COALESCE(m20.return_pct, 999) ASC, e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY COALESCE(m20.return_pct, -999) DESC, e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY COALESCE(m60.return_pct, 999) ASC, e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY COALESCE(m60.return_pct, -999) DESC, e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY e.signal_date ASC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY e.signal_date DESC, e.stock_code ASC
ORDER BY e.signal_date DESC, e.signal_score DESC, e.stock_code ASC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT stock_code AS stockCode, stock_name AS stockName, sample_event_count AS sampleEventCount, win_rate_5d AS winRate5d, win_rate_10d AS winRate10d, win_rate_20d AS winRate20d, avg_return_5d AS avgReturn5d, avg_return_10d AS avgReturn10d, avg_return_20d AS avgReturn20d, median_return_20d AS medianReturn20d, avg_max_drawdown_20d AS avgMaxDrawdown20d, hit_5pct_rate_20d AS hit5pctRate20d, hit_10pct_rate_60d AS hit10pctRate60d, historical_response_score AS historicalResponseScore, backtest_score AS backtestScore, last_event_date AS lastEventDate FROM stock_backtest_summary WHERE stock_code = #{code}

SELECT e.event_id AS eventId, e.stock_code AS stockCode, e.stock_name AS stockName, e.signal_date AS signalDate, e.event_scope AS eventScope, e.increase_count AS increaseCount, e.increase_amount AS increaseAmount, e.increase_ratio_sum AS increaseRatioSum, e.increase_ratio_max AS increaseRatioMax, e.changer_count AS changerCount, e.changer_names AS changerNames, e.position_tags AS positionTags, e.has_same_day_decrease AS hasSameDayDecrease, e.same_day_decrease_amount AS sameDayDecreaseAmount, e.consecutive_increase_days AS consecutiveIncreaseDays, e.signal_score AS signalScore, COALESCE(s.backtest_score, 0) AS backtestScore FROM stock_signal_event e LEFT JOIN stock_backtest_summary s ON s.stock_code = e.stock_code WHERE e.event_id = #{eventId}

SELECT horizon_days AS horizonDays, entry_date AS entryDate, entry_price AS entryPrice, entry_price_type AS entryPriceType, exit_date AS exitDate, exit_price AS exitPrice, return_pct AS returnPct, max_return_pct AS maxReturnPct, max_drawdown_pct AS maxDrawdownPct, volatility_pct AS volatilityPct, hit_3pct_flag AS hit3pctFlag, hit_5pct_flag AS hit5pctFlag, hit_10pct_flag AS hit10pctFlag, is_positive_flag AS isPositiveFlag, bars_count AS barsCount FROM stock_backtest_metric WHERE event_id = #{eventId} ORDER BY horizon_days
